Angsana Lang Co - Nơi nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao tuyệt vời ở Đà Nẵng

Angsana Lang Co là một khách sạn 5 sao nằm tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn chỉ cách sân bay 75 phút lái xe và cách trung tâm thành phố 60 km. Khách sạn có tổng cộng 220 phòng, được xây dựng vào năm 2012 và đã được tu sửa lại vào năm 2023.

Khách sạn có thời gian nhận phòng từ 03:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng đến 12:00 PM. Điều này giúp quý khách có đủ thời gian để thư giãn và tận hưởng trọn vẹn kỳ nghỉ của mình tại đây.

Đặc biệt, Angsana Lang Co cũng chấp nhận trẻ em từ 4 đến 11 tuổi ở miễn phí. Điều này tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ khi lựa chọn nơi nghỉ dưỡng này.

Sự Hài Lòng Của Khách Hàng Với Angsana Lang Co

Angsana Lang Co tọa lạc tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, là một địa điểm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp được đánh giá cao bởi khách hàng. Với tổng điểm 8.8/10, khách hàng đã chứng tỏ sự hài lòng của mình với trải nghiệm tại khách sạn này.

Khách hàng đánh giá rằng Angsana Lang Co có giá trị tuyệt vời với điểm số 8.9/10. Với dịch vụ chất lượng và tiện nghi tốt, khách sạn này đáng giá mỗi đồng bạn chi trả. Bạn sẽ không thất vọng khi lựa chọn Angsana Lang Co là điểm dừng chân trong kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Một điểm mạnh khác của Angsana Lang Co là cơ sở vật chất với điểm số 9.1/10. Khách hàng đánh giá rằng khách sạn này cung cấp các tiện nghi tuyệt vời để đáp ứng nhu cầu của họ. Từ hồ bơi đẹp mắt đến spa sang trọng, bạn sẽ tận hưởng những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ tại đây.

sample_comments.response:
Bạn Nguyệt thân mến,

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Thoải mái

sample_comments.text:
Đã trở lại Angsana Lăng Cô!
Trong chuyến đi này, tôi cũng đã sử dụng khu nghỉ dưỡng Angsana Lăng Cô và thật sự rất hài lòng.
Đầu tiên, quy mô của khu nghỉ dưỡng rất rộng lớn và hòa mình vào thiên nhiên, nên suốt thời gian lưu trú, tôi cảm thấy được thư giãn. Bãi biển riêng kết nối trực tiếp với biển rất sạch sẽ và yên tĩnh, tôi đã có thể thưởng thức thoải mái. Hồ bơi cũng rộng rãi và được chăm sóc tốt, cả gia đình đều hài lòng.

Phòng ở sạch sẽ và rộng rãi, giúp tôi có thể nghỉ ngơi thoải mái, và các nhân viên luôn thân thiện tiếp đón, tôi rất cảm ơn điều đó. Bữa sáng buffet rất đa dạng và ngon miệng, mỗi buổi sáng đều thú vị. Đặc biệt, có nhiều món ăn Việt Nam và các món quốc tế được chuẩn bị nên có nhiều lựa chọn.

Các hoạt động trong khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng đa dạng, không có thời gian nào để cảm thấy buồn chán và rất phù hợp để đi cùng trẻ em. Hơn hết, không khí yên tĩnh và riêng tư khiến nơi đây là lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho chuyến đi gia đình hoặc chuyến đi lãng mạn của các cặp đôi.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng cách trung tâm Đà Nẵng một chút, nhưng đã có xe đưa đón hoạt động nên không quá bất tiện, thậm chí tôi còn thích việc được rời xa sự ồn ào của thành phố để thư giãn yên tĩnh hơn.

Tổng thể, mức độ hài lòng với giá cả rất cao, và đây là khu nghỉ dưỡng mà tôi muốn quay lại.
Nếu bạn đang lên kế hoạch cho chuyến đi miền Trung Việt Nam, tôi rất muốn giới thiệu Angsana Lăng Cô!

sample_comments.text:
2 đêm ở Angsana Lang Co thật sự không đủ.. Phòng rất đẹp và tôi rất thích mùi hương của các tiện nghi.. Mùi hương trái cây ngọt ngào?? Dù sao đi nữa, nó rất hợp với sở thích cá nhân của tôi!
Tất cả nhân viên đều rất thân thiện và khi sử dụng các tiện ích, mọi người đều tỏ ra rất chu đáo, điều đó để lại ấn tượng sâu sắc!
Đặc biệt là khi ăn sáng, vị quản lý đã nhớ tất cả khách lưu trú và tận tình chăm sóc từng người, dịch vụ thật tuyệt vời!! Người phục vụ riêng cũng rất chu đáo và đặc biệt cà phê dừa rất ngon! Nhất định hãy yêu cầu thử nhé!!
Mặc dù khoảng cách từ trung tâm Đà Nẵng khá xa nhưng khi sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt sân bay miễn phí, tôi cảm thấy an tâm và có thể chợp mắt ngay cả khi chỉ trong một thời gian ngắn!!!
Hẹn gặp lại lần sau!!!!

sample_comments.title: Five stars resort but one star guest service!
sample_comments.text: I was stay in this resort just four hours then I have something need to do so I need leave early,in 4 hours I was spent 200usd in wash clothes,eat and shopping ,but when I need leave early at 6pm, I don't understand why they don't let me take the shuttle bus go to airport,they only said:[sorry our shuttle bus only can pick up the costumer who they was check out ],even I changed room name to my girlfriend still can't let me take the bus so I need pay $33 usd for order taxi,I spent over $350 usd in here but I only get a word for them:[sorry our bus you can't take it^^],I was lived many 5 resorts before but I never see this kind of stingy service!!really the worst 5stars guests service
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Chen,

Thank you for taking the time to share your review with us!
Please accept our sincere apologies in regards to your most recent experience at our resort. I am saddened to read your comments regarding the unpleasant experience with our shuttle bus and service team. Our Front Office Manager has sent an individual email to you to express our sincere and we definitely would love to address your disappointment in a proper way to recover your impression with us.
Thank you once again and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Kind regards,
Figen Bulut
Hotel Manager

sample_comments.title: The hotel is beautiful but missing a vibe, a bit of music will help!
sample_comments.positives: The rooms are big and the hotel is beautiful.
sample_comments.negatives: The food is really mediocre and really expensive (no other choices in the area).

sample_comments.title: Needs a complete renovation
sample_comments.text: This is the worst hotel we have ever stayed at. How this is rated a 5 star simply comes down to the hotel ticking boxes. The fact it is part of the Banyan Tree brand is even more concerning and enough to make me never book a stay at the Banyan Tree. We visited the Banyan Tree at Lang Co as well and dined at 2 of the restaurants and encountered shocking service and dated facilities. The entire resort including the banyan tree needs to be closed and renovated.
sample_comments.response:

We are truly sorry to learn about your experience and, most importantly, that we missed the opportunity to address your concerns during our daily conversations with you while you were with us. Please accept our sincere apologies for the service shortfalls and the condition of the facilities you encountered. We would greatly appreciate it if you could share more specific details regarding the service experiences you described, as this will help us investigate thoroughly and improve further.

Your comments have been shared with our management team and
sample_comments.room_type: Skypool Two Bedroom Seaview Loft with Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel on incredible beach. Remote so peaceful.
sample_comments.positives: Right on the beach. So nice.

sample_comments.title: Old and secluded property with dated facilities
sample_comments.text: We were a family with 3 kids and had booked the hotel because of the Angsana brand . But the whole experience was a disappointment . Property is very old and secluded and the facilities and equipment are very dated . There is nothing much to do at the hotel and it takes 1.5 hours to get to Danang , Hue or Bana Hills . The equipment at the Playhub and Water Sports Center were old and dated . Limited variety at breakfast buffet and there were only 2 restaurants at the hotel with limited variety and expensive pricing . There is no minimart on site or nearby. Pool was small and cold . Room had a musty smell . I was expecting a more luxurious experience from Angsana but was highly disappointed .
sample_comments.response:
Dear Michelle,

Thank you for sharing your feedback again. We sincerely regret that your stay did not meet your expectations and that we fell short of the experience you anticipated from the Angsana brand. Your comments regarding the location, facilities, dining options, and overall condition of the property are well noted and have been shared with our management team for review and improvement. While we are sorry that we could not change your overall impression, we appreciate the opportunity to address your concerns during the latter part of your stay.

We truly hope you may consider giving us another opportunity in the future to regain your trust.

Kind regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Great place to take a rest for families
sample_comments.positives: Not crowded and calm to take a rest, very good of the huge swimming pool for kids as well as the beach.
sample_comments.negatives: The location is a bit far from Danang Intl airport but it is still fine with the free shuttle service

sample_comments.title: Very secluded old property
sample_comments.text: Stayed here for 7 nights with 3 kids and absolutely regretted it . The hotel is 1.5 hours from Danang and there are very limited activities to do at the hotel . The hotel and facilities are very dated and food options are very limited and expensive . It is very expensive and far to travel from the hotel to the major attractions like Hue or Bana Hills . The pool was small and old and water was very cold , so nothing much to do in Dec . I booked this place because of the Angsana brand , but I am totally disappointed by the whole experience and will not recommend it to anyone . You get much better value for money for properties in Danang or Hoa Hai.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Michelle,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely regret that your 7-night stay did not meet your expectations and that we fell short of the experience you anticipated from the Angsana brand.

We understand how important comfort and engaging activities are for families, and we are sorry that our location, facilities, and dining options did not provide the experience you had hoped for. Your feedback has been shared with the relevant teams for review and improvement.

While we regret not addressing your concerns earlier, we appreciate the opportunity to respond during the final days of your stay. We truly hope you will consider giving us another opportunity in the future so we may regain your trust.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite

sample_comments.title: Secluded and peaceful beach location, with well groomed souroundings and comfortable hotel.
sample_comments.positives:
The breakfast buffet was delicious, and the staff was great! 
I had dinner at the Rice Bowl a few times, and the Japanese food and service were excellent! However, compared to similar restaurants in Hanoi, it was a bit pricy.

The beach was excellent, clean and quiet. The proximity to the golf course was fantastic too, although I did not play, as I was there to watch a tournament.

sample_comments.title: I would never choose this place again
sample_comments.text:
Room rate is quite high
Food is extremely expensive, for a normal meal it is ~$100/person
Beach is not safe, usually notifying with red flag and guest cannot enjoy the beach
We saw a snake around the garden
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs. Hien Nhu, 

Thank you for taking the time to leave us your comments.

It was disappointed knowing that we have failed to meet your expectations and that you have not enjoyed thoroughly during your recent visit.

We deeply apologize for the shortcomings which lead you to write and rate us this low. Please rest assured that we will take all your comments seriously to avoid any occurrence of this nature.

We hope and trust that this unfortunate experience will not completely tarnish your opinion of Angsana and that we will have the opportunity to welcome you back on a future occasion for a more pleasurable experience.

Best regards, 

Glen Cook 
Area General Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Junior Sea View Suite King with Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Excellent facility in every respect, terrific customer service and attention to guest satisfaction - we highly recommend
sample_comments.positives: The resort was a pleasant surprise - we expected less based on reviews and online information and found it to be a beautiful, luxurious facility with top-notch amenities and staff, outstanding breakfast buffet, well equipped gym, several swimming pools, a huge clean beach, and all the little extra touches - from welcome refreshments to incense and fruits in the sitting area. Our beach-front suite was spacious with a very comfortable proper king bed and its own infinity plunge pool. We wished we had had more time there!

sample_comments.title: Totally not recommended
sample_comments.text:
I couldn't wait to GET OUT of this resort! . It is old, worn down, very humid, smelly and extremely bad-managed. 

There are 2 complexes in the resort and if you are unfortunately being assigned to a room in the complex closer to the reception, it is like going into a haunted house. The corridor is dark and creepy and it has this very suffocating vibe that you wouldn't want to stay there at all (not to mention that it smells like the whole complex is molded). I actually paid for the most expensive room type -Angsana Skypool 2-bedrooms Villa; however we had to change the room, not only because the room is no way close to a 5-stars hotel room, it is leaking because of rain and there were puddles and dead insects waiting for us, and the toilet seat in the guest toilet is broken,! Even though they have eventually changed another room which is on the ground floor for us, the toilet is still leaking! If you flush the toilet the floor becomes wet and slippery.
Food here is UNREASONABLY Expensive and we felt like we are being ripped off! They exploited on visitors because there are basically no other restaurants nearby!. How could a bowl of beef noodle costs USD30 + 17% tax!!! while a regular restaurant only charges you for USD1-2!!!! And if the food served here is good I would suck it up; but to be honest the food here is not up to standard at all! The breakfast is unhealthy and food is either loaded with lots of sugar or are very greasy. Fruits served are not even seasonal 

I would have to say that the hotel manager was very helpful and polite; but most of the staffs dont speak English well and if you call the reception they never understand what you want and service is close to zero. 

Completely not worth spending time here.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Dana,

Thank you for spending time sharing your candid feedback here.

Please accept my most sincere apology for any issues that you may have suffered during your stay with us. Please rest assured the Resort Management treat guest feedback with utmost importance and seriousness to ensure we learn from our mistake and continuously maintain service standards.

I truly hope to have an opportunity to welcome you back to our resort in the future to regain your impression and bring you a more memorable stay.

Warm Regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

sample_comments.title: Definitely will come back to taste the chocolate cake that I missed at Moomba restaurant :)
sample_comments.positives: Natural beauty, close to the sea, fresh sea, breezy weather, beautiful scenery. Friendly service and staff.
sample_comments.negatives:
The time waiting for ready rooms was longer than expected. The receptionist said the rooms would be ready in maximum 1 hour upon our arrival, but turned out we had to wait for around 2 hours. We could wait for all the clean-up, however we just wanted the resort informed us the exact time.

The shower is designed not to be easy to use. The erecting water flow is set default, and it made us shocked and startled when the water coming out suddenly without notice. It was not a good experience!

The pool was not clean after a tempest. This was an objective factor but impacted our experience when swimming.

sample_comments.title: Price and performance do not match
sample_comments.text: The Angsana is a wonderful hotel property at a great beach. If one like a very remote spot this is the place to be. The rooms are 5 star and so is the price level for all products and services throughout the whole property. Unfortunately, the product quality (especially in F&B) and the service level are nothing like 5 star. There is a big gap between price and performance !. Everybody is friendly and polite but at the same time the competency level of local staff is very low. Constandly customer requests are either misunderstood, need a long time to be fulfilled or are simply forgotten. There is still a long way for the management to go before the five stars are earned !
sample_comments.positives: Beach, Pool, Tranquility

sample_comments.title: Pleasant and comfortable. Great service!
sample_comments.positives: Amazing services from all the staff from Bayan Tree to Angsana and Laguna Golf. Very attentive, caring and went above and beyond to fulfill customers' requests.
sample_comments.negatives: F&B service should improve, the quality of food is mediocre at best. A bit overpriced for the quality of food offered at all 5 restaurants

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
All services and dining are very expensive even for 5 star standards.

It is in a remote location, travelling outside is also difficult.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Cao, 

Thank you for your candid feedback on the recent stay at Angsana Lăng Cô. We are sorry to learn that our service cost was not as your expectation which led you to write and rate us this low. Rest assured that we treat your comments with utmost importance and seriousness at all time and would certainly like to learn more for service improvement in the future.

Cao, we really hope this experience will not impair your trust in Angsana and give us an opportunity of welcoming you back to show you our improvements.

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: There's nothing to complain but praises. Love every minute of it.

sample_comments.title: A terrible unprofessional service with non transparent information
sample_comments.text: We, a family with 4 months old and 14 months infants, flew from the South to Da Nang. Then I was driving my whole family to Lang Co, upon reached there I was figuring out there is no such signs of road direction to the Angsana resort. I immediately called the resort's reception number and was directed that I need to find a sign board with a name of Laguna. Fortunately after 2 times I had passed the sign, I found a relatively small "Laguna" indicating the resort is 22km away, I was going forward to the sign direction and getting nervous since the road was totally empty with no sign of lives. I called the resort again to double check, but no one picked up the phone. I repeated the same number for 5 times with no luck despite that 10 minutes ago someone did pick up. Eventually my sixth call I reached to the front desk and was told the direction is correct, Laguna is the umbrella group owning Angsana. Why on earth they indicate the group name on the road sign instead of the resort name? I asked why at 2:30pm but no one from the front desk picked up the phone, the ringing sound was too low to hear she said.. Eventually I reached to the resort at 3pm and the front desk lady took me other 15 minutes for check in, then the concierge guy led our family going on walk for other 15 minutes to the room located at the dead end corner which they called Angsana Sky Pool villa with a view to the rotten trees and the dead water flow which is !! totally different from the view indicated on agoda !! I called the front desk and a guy was helping me out by downgrading my first class room to the second class room which has a partial view to the pool and the ocean with a reason given that the Angsana Sky room I requested is occupied and that is the !! only one !! room has the best view indicated on Agoda. They also said I booked this through agoda so that the resort is not able to pay me back the cost difference. Fair enough.. But at least the resort owes me a apology of giving a non trans

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Giant, beautiful and very clean beach. Amazing pool. Very friendly and helpful staff. Modern and comfortable rooms.
sample_comments.negatives: Restaurants can be crowded for diner

sample_comments.title: Staff very bad
sample_comments.text: The staff very bad , face very dark . Never care about customer

sample_comments.title: Incredible food, amazing staff, beautiful location, and exceptional experience.
sample_comments.positives: We really enjoyed the peace and serenity. We had a suite with a private pool and it was clean, spacious and bright. The resort is linked to other resorts and it was really fun taking the golf buggies between the different facilities. There was nothing that we could fault. However, it is the staff that really make a place and the level of care and attention we received made our holiday exceptional. Shout out to Hien for my off menu coconut coffee and the recipe. Thank you for taking such good care of us.
sample_comments.negatives: There was nothing that we didn't like. We fully intend to travel there again.

sample_comments.title: Hidaway resort
sample_comments.text: Very modern resort, but overly priced. Considering the remote location I would expect more restaurant choices inside the resort. Food and service quality was less than average considering the price.
sample_comments.positives: Great land scape, great Pool, Long sandy beach

sample_comments.title: Our stay was amazing - we definitely would recommend this hotel to others!
sample_comments.positives: The staff was super welcoming and engaged with our family - especially our children! For example, during breakfast they brought out packets of fish food for the kids to feed the fish. The staff was very responsive on the WhatsApp channel and they went above and beyond to ensure that we had a comfortable stay. All of the food at all of the restaurants was delicious - we did all of our meals at the resort and there were plenty of options between the different restaurants. We also enjoyed the "treasure hunt" at the pool, body boards at the beach, and massages at the spa (included in our package).
sample_comments.negatives: The pool needs some repairs - there are some missing and uneven tiles. That being said, the pool was super clean and clear, so this didn't bother us or prevent us from using the pool.

sample_comments.title: Just OK, not too much special as my expectation
sample_comments.text:
The staffs are good, friendly and helpful which is a plus.
My seaview room (2517) was on 5th floor, I like it, not love it as the furniture, floor looks quite old, need to renovated.
I like the big bathroom with bathtub (seaview), wide balcony but it looks not too interesting.
The room rate is high but not as my expectation.
The location is hidden, so hard to book a grabcar or motobike to get there.
The price for F&B is too high.
I like outdoor activities and the landscape around, kayak, canal boat and bicycle riding are good.

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: We had an incredible stay at Angsana and can't thank the staff enough for their exceptional hospitality. From check-in t
sample_comments.positives: Everything was incredible especially the staff!
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing!!

sample_comments.title: Remote & strange
sample_comments.text:
I have not enjoyed my stay at Angsana. There's something odd and abandoned about the resort. Busy at breakfast then absolutely deserted all day.
The hotel (plus the Banyan Tree next door) are the first phases of an apparently terminated plan to turn Lang Co into a mega sized luxury destination. But are now suffering from the remoteness and lack of infrastructure.
Rooms are now clean & functional but a bit dated. Lack of carpets and/or soundproofing result in constant noise from heavy doors slamming, not relaxing.
Service & policies at the hotel are also odd. If you phone for a transport or restaurant reservation they will confirm the details before ending the call, but then the same person will call back 5 mins later to repeat everything again. 
I asked for a quiet room and was given a big group team building exercise outside, with the leader on a megaphone singing all afternoon. Apologies when I call to ask what's going on but that's not enough when I want to rest and relax. The only lift is also being serviced and is out of action. 
At night there is a great deal of wildlife, if that bothers you. In particular there are frogs in the pond which make incredible noise (for their size), a bit like some of the guests.
Cannot fault the facilities and pool etc. but it's literally deserted - no one around, no atmosphere.
Food is good for the price point.
Cannot recommend the destination - stick to Denang beach front.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Nick, 

Thank you for taking the time to comment on your observations in such a detailed and constructive manner. Please accept my most sincere apology for not delivering you a perfect vacation on the last stay. Rest assured the Management team and I treat your feedback with utmost importance and seriousness to ensure we learn from our mistakes and continuously maintain service standards.
 
Nick, we do hope to have an opportunity to welcome you back, to not only restore your confidence in us but also bring you a memorable stay as many other guests had experienced. Again with my apology for all the inconvenience.

Best regards, 

Franck Rodriguez 
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Angsana was a perfect place for our family to holiday due to the exceptional care of the staff.
sample_comments.positives:
Loved the breakfast variety and especially coffee drinks. Staff at breakfast was amazing- remembering our coffee drinks, inviting us to try coconut caphe. 
We were traveling with our grandson- so we did crafts (coconut bowl and candle making). Very fun and wonderful staff helping. 
We loved the foam party and special foods at that time. 
The beach is great for long walks. It was fun to swim in the ocean and nice to have a lifeguard nearby. 
The canals in the pool were fun to spend lots of time in the water exploring and get in and out of sun. 
Had a wonderful massage with very good massage therapist, Tina. Loved the tea before and tea and fruit after. Very pampering. 
Overall- staff was exceptional. Their kindness, smiles and helpfulness made our trip amazing. Thank you.
sample_comments.negatives: A small convenience store in the property would be nice. Otherwise you have to get a taxi to go out.

sample_comments.title: Remotely located for a getaway
sample_comments.text: Location was too remote and far from any eateries. Good for just 1-2 night stay in my opinion. There wasn't any dining discount for guests unless you are an Accor member. Beach was nice and spa was very good. The room checkout procedure could be improved... the staff did a thorough check in our room before we left in our presence, even for the board games that was left for kids to play, making us feel a bit uncomfortable as if we will take the items. Have not experienced such checking in the presence of guests before.

We wish these concerns were brought to our attention soonest during your stay, then we could do our best to make your stay more memorable. 

Eileen, it is with your reviews that we can continue to evaluate our services and be more proactive to learn guest's needs to provide great services to all our guests, at all times. Once again, we hope and trust that, this misunderstanding experience will not completely tarnish your opinion of Angsana and that we will have the opportunity of welcoming you again for a more pleasant stay.

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

sample_comments.title: overrated hotel
sample_comments.text:
The resturant is expensive, service is bad. We went to the rice resurant at 7:30pm till 9:20 for our foods to be ready. Keep rushing for my son's food to come our first but till take almost 2 hours!!!!
The rooms is more of 4 star hotel standard, with lots of people there. We book the unlimited spa package with late check out at 6pm. However, the staff keep telling us need to check out before 12, so I need to explain to booking to them at least 4 times!! The tub is dirty, and no place to put luggage, and there is no table inside the room for room servie, so either eat at the balcony or sit on the floor. My advice is stay at other 5 star hotel in Da Nang, or if you want to visit Lang co, just book Bayan Tree, it is much better, but try to bring some foods there, so you can eat some thing before going to the resturant, which will take at least a hour for the food to be ready!!

Ça peut plaire, mais pour nous qui voulions facilement explorer la région, ça s'est révélé un peu compliqué. Heureusement nous avions trouvé un taxi externe qui nous a emmené où nous voulions facilement et à plutôt bon marché. Et choisissez bien la saison, car quand il pleut ou qu'il y a du brouillard, ça devient un peu triste.

sample_comments.title: Nice, But Possibly Going Backwards re Sustainility
sample_comments.text:
Not our first time here. Rooms are generally good value for money. Hotel itself is a quality build with a good layout. Vietnamese food is good quality and authentic. 

However.... a policy change at the hotel has led to serving all poolside food in fully-enclosed plastic takeaway containers, with sauces also in fully-enclosed plastic containers. Not ccovenient to eat from, nor a 5-star experience. Also, Viet Nam is one of the world's largest plastic polluters (https://tuoitrenews.vn/news/society/20180421/vietnam-generates-nearly-18000-tons-of-plastic-waste-a-day-seminar/45207.html) and unfortunately Angsana has taken a step backwards in this sense. I hope hotel Management can see at least the commercial sense in trying a more sustainable path.

sample_comments.title: Nice resort, but not a wow
sample_comments.text:
We have stayed at the Intercontinental, Hyatt Regency in Da Nang as well as JW Marriott in Phu Quoc. I expected similar options at Angsana but it was far below my expectations. This resort needs more variety in restaurants with more local cuisine. Every dish was ~400+ vmd but nothing special. Kids meals were not priced as such unlike competitor hotels like Intercontinental. Breakfast buffet was repetitive and was nothing special. Very standard plus a hot noodle. Very disappointing given the price. Fruit was the same every day - watermelon, passion fruit, papaya, orange. No mangos on any of the 4 days. 

Pros: Resort is spacious and modern. 2 bedroom suite was clean and updated. Nice mix of Vietnamese, European guests. Not a lot of Koreans like other hotels in the city. Staff is very kind. 
Airport transportation is easy and priced fair (if choosing private). 

Cons: 
Very far from the city, with nothing but golf or pool to entertain. Pool Water was hot at all hours of the day which made swimming actually uncomfortable. 
Restaurants are lacking - there are 3 onsite and they all lacked variety of Vietnamese food. Overpriced even for this type of resort. burdensome if going with family; bottled water is 5x price at restaurant. No type of shop to buy snacks to make sure you bring your own. 

For this price, you can stay at better hotels that are closer to the city.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jennifer,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your recent stay with us. While we are delighted to know that you enjoyed the resort itself and kindness of our team, we are truly sorry to learn that other aspects of your experience fell short of your expectations.

We regret that our dining variety, children's menu pricing, and breakfast buffet did not meet the level you had experienced at other resorts in Vietnam. Your constructive comments regarding menu diversity, local cuisine options, and fruit variety are invaluable, and please be assured that we will review them closely with our culinary team. We also take note of your observations on pool temperature, onsite conveniences, and pricing, as we continually strive to provide both quality and value for our guests.

We understand your perspective that our location offers a more tranquil retreat away from the bustle of the city, and we are sorry if this limited the entertainment options for your family.

Once again, it was a great pleasure to have you with us and we do look forward to welcoming you back at Angsana Lang Co if your travels ever bring you back to Central Vietnam. 

Best regards, 

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

sample_comments.title: Trotz wunderschönener Lage nicht das erwartete Erlebnis.
sample_comments.positives: Die Hotelanlage ist wunderschön zwischen Meer und Bergen gelegen an einem wirklich traumhaften Strand, an dem absolut nichts los ist. Auch die Anlage selbst sieht hübsch aus, die Zimmer (wir hatten ein zweistöckiges am Dach mit eigenem Pool) sind riesengroß, dass man sich darin fast verläuft. Das Personal ist super freundlich und das Frühstücksbuffet lässt keine Wünsche offen. Asiatisch, amerikanisch, europäisch, Früchte,... also definitiv für jeden was dabei.
sample_comments.negatives:
Das Hotel ist schon deutlich in die Jahre gekommen und wird gerade abschnittsweise generalüberholt. Ein Teil ist Baustelle! Wir hatten ein Zimmer in dem Teil der noch nicht renoviert wurde und das hat man an allen Ecken und Enden gesehen. Terrasse, Pool, Dusche im Freien, Fenster, waren sehr gezeichnet. 
Das Essen fand ich für ein Hotel der Kategorie eher durchschnittlich. Wir hatten zweimal beim Abendessen jeweils ein Gericht das sehr geschmacksneutral war. Im Zimmer war teilweise viel Staub vor allem in den Schränken. Die Terrasse war dreckig, dass ich eine extra Reinigung verlangt habe. Licht auf der Terrasse für abends funktionierte nicht. Tagsüber auf der Terrasse beim eigenen Pool liegen war aber sowieso unmöglich, da es keinen Schatten gab. Roomcleaning kam generell erst nach 16.30 Uhr. Man bekommt fast überall in den Restaurants zum Großteil Plastikgläser. Und das in einem 5 Sterne Hotel. Abends nach dem Essen konnte man nur noch aufs Zimmer gehen. Keine Bar wo man noch etwas trinken konnte. Also die perfekte Anlage, um von allem runter zu kommen. 
Englisch beim Personal an der Rezeption war ein Lotteriespiel. Sie konnten zwar alle Englisch aber teilweise mit so einer Aussprache, dass man nichts verstanden hat. Und wenn man dann in klarem Englisch spricht, verstehen sie dich zum Teil nicht und sagen man müssen genauer sprechen. Sorry aber in einer 5 Sternanlage ein no go.

sample_comments.title: The Stay
sample_comments.text:
Stay was great. But the location is too secluded. You cant find any shops,mart nearby. The food was really expensive and i feel its not worth. 
They close early and you wont have any entertainment,so feel little bored. Otherwise are all good.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Dilliban, 

Thank you for letting us know your experience and taking the time to comment on your observations in such a constructive manner. Please accept my most sincere apology for any issues that you may have suffered during your stay with us. Rest assured the Resort Management treat your feedback with utmost importance and seriousness to ensure we learn from our shortcomings and continuously maintain facilities and service standards.

sample_comments.title: some problems
sample_comments.text:
I was not happy due to two matters. Others are all OK!
1) I reserved one bed seaview suite.
Agoda mentioned kitchen facility in web site.
But Angsana people gave room without kitchen facility.
Angsana never said the reason. I changed another room because my wife did not like the room.
2) When I leaved hotel after check-out, I reserved shuttle bus at 12:30.
Man in checking shuttle asked me the time. I said my time.
He did not ask my room and said that he is NOT HAPPY because I want to change shuttle time
from 15:00 to 12:30. When I said my room number, he understood but did not say "SORRY"
I was also not happy when he said "not happy" with unhappy face.

I was very happy during staying except above two things.
sample_comments.response:

Figen Bulut

sample_comments.title: Great hotel BUT
sample_comments.text: We had 2 night here so husband could play golf. Great golf course..We had a really nice room.Sea view with a private pool. Remember it's guite away from any where so they have got you. Food price are at the top end... but can not complain about the quality.. Really enjoyed the Japanese Restaurant..The sand at beach is not white and it's so hot it burns your feet. The jet ski trip up the river was good but jet skis are bit old..Our pool was in need of a lot of maintenance, mould in tiles and slap happy paint, cracked marble tile surrounds .Opened our doors in morning and heard the surf and birds.....then the music from the bar start about 11am and finished about 10pm, That bass doush doush sound. Apparently it's what the people at the bar like,but, there was no one at the bar most of the day... So I think I just expected more from this resort

Figen Bulut

sample_comments.text:
In general i am disappointed in my two stays in here.
(i) Buffet breakfast: not enough space for guest and it is not ok when we have to look for and seize table while table was not clear and clean by the hotel people. And it is not acceptable to receive a respond from their staff that "sorry you can go around and get back later when it is available" and "because we have a group guest"...
(ii) Since the location is far from town, we need to ask for taxi transportation from desk, and we got a very dirty and old car (inova) and it is not taxi but the contracted car with hotel (as the driver told). Fees is double compared with normal taxi. As hotel either we use hotel car or contracted car service we need a high standard, reliable services. It will eliminate good images of hotel in myself.

sample_comments.title: Angsana Lang Co
sample_comments.text: The hotel and facilities are fantastic, but location is not. The food also, was not (way overpriced for food that doesn't even taste good). If you wanted to get out of the hotel to try some local street food you would have to call a taxi that charged $35 US for a round trip to town.

sample_comments.title: Everything Great Except Food
sample_comments.text:
Two restaurants Rice Bowl and Rice Bar were closed during my stay, which topped my wishlist for staying at the hotel. While the Boomba was seriously understaffed for dinner and the food quality is below average. There is no Vietnamese cuisine on the menu - I couldn't believe there is no Pho except in buffet breakfast - but offers spaghetti or burgers or fried rice kinds of fast food on all restaurant menus including in in-room dining. 
This is no supermarket nearby. Staff recommend us to go to Banyan Tree next door for meals - but still, the variety is very limited (and I still couldn't have a taste of Pho).
Having said that, the pool, the beach, the view are perfect. Shower water flow is strong enough (which is not a guarantee always I have learnt). Staff are friendly.Room is great (though house-keeping is slow when we found there were biscuit and used tissues in the drawer next to bed). And the hotel doesn't allow customers to connect own laptop thru HDMI, argh too bad!
sample_comments.positives: Pool, Beach, Room, Friendly staff

sample_comments.title: Unser Aufenthalt im Angsana Lang Co war einfach unglaublich! Perfekte Zimmer, ein riesiges Pool, fantastisches Essen und
sample_comments.positives:
Wir hatten das Vergnügen, im Angsana Lang Co zu übernachten, und es war einfach unglaublich! Dieses Resort ist ein wahres Paradies - von der atemberaubenden Aussicht bis zu den riesigen, makellos sauberen Zimmern, die perfekt zum Entspannen einladen. Das unfassbar große Pool ist ein Highlight, ideal zum Schwimmen und Entspannen, während man die herrliche Umgebung genießt.

Das Essen in jedem der Restaurants war fantastisch - jeder Bissen ein Genuss, mit einer Vielfalt, die keine Wünsche offen lässt.

Aber was unseren Aufenthalt wirklich unvergesslich gemacht hat, waren die Mitarbeiter. Jeder einzelne war außergewöhnlich freundlich und zuvorkommend. Der Service war einfach unfassbar - man hat sich jederzeit willkommen und bestens betreut gefühlt. Die Herzlichkeit und Professionalität des gesamten Teams hat den Aufenthalt noch spezieller gemacht.

Wir können das Angsana Lang Co nur wärmstens empfehlen - einfach Wahnsinn!
sample_comments.negatives: Es gibt absolut nichts zu beanstanden - jeder Aspekt unseres Aufenthalts war perfekt und hat unsere Erwartungen übertroffen.

sample_comments.title: Excellent service and polite staff. Breakfast buffet is amazing
sample_comments.text: But location is far from city and tourist spots and facilities of resort is limited and private pool is small
sample_comments.response:
Dear KA,

It was our pleasure to be of service to you during your stay and our further pleasure to now read you kind comments to us here. I am glad that you enjoyed our service, hospitality and breakfast buffet. However, it seems that our location and the facilities provided were not up to your expectation. To be honest, the uniqueness of our location is one of the main reasons many guests book with us. The secluded location, accommodation and wide range of activities we offer make us different. We do hope that the location was not the factor that affects your stay too much as our shuttle service is always available to pick our guests to the tourist spots on a daily basis. We wish you all the very best from here and hope to be able to welcome you back again soon enough.

With kind regards,
Figen Bulut 
Hotel Manager

1. 수영장: 골프 치는 투숙객이 많이 오는 것 같더라고요, 골프는 치지 않지만 북적이고 번잡한 시내보다 조용한 곳에서 수영만 하며 쉬고 싶어 일부러 멀리 랑코까지 갔는데, 수영장 물이 뜨거울줄은 진짴ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 생각지도 못했어요.. 유일한 일정이 수영이었는데.. 그래서 300미터짜리 수영장 있는 곳으로 간 건데.. 해가 너무 강렬해서 수영장 전체가 걍 달궈짐..(폼파티 맞춰 오후4시) 나무 그늘 아래는 따뜻한 물 그늘 밖은 뜨거운 물.. 바다도 눈앞에 있지만 베트남 해변은 대부분 한국 바다랑 비슷한 색감과 투명도이기 때문에 굳이 안 갔어요,, 달궈진 해변(맨발로 절대 못 걸음)도 그 더위에 걷기 꽤 길기 때문에,, 
+ 그래도 여기까지 왔는데!하며 수영장에 들어갔는데, 벽으로 이어지는 바닥 부분(구석) 타일이 깨져있는 구간이 곳곳에 있음. 발바닥 간수 잘 해야해요.. 워낙 수영장이 길고 커서 유지보수 어려워 보였다요. 이럴거면 그 규모 리조트에 쾌적하고 시원한 실내 수영장 하나 만들어줬으면..!

2. 조식: 다른 리조트에 있다와서 상대적으로 느끼는 부분이긴 하지만, 이정도 성급에 비하면 너무 부족하다는 생각. 쌀국수 면 다 뭉쳐있고.. 과일 주스는 생과일주스보다는 시판주스 느낌. 조식 두번 먹었으나 망고 한 번도 안 나옴. 고기류는 질긴 편이었음. 맛있었던건 달걀 요리, 해시브라운, 베이컨, 베이커리류. 조식시간 혼잡도 안내에 6-7시에 한가하다 그래서 6시 20분에 갔는데 문 닫혀 있었고 직원이 7시에 여는데 왜 지금왔냐 그래서 안내판 사진 찍은거 보여주니까 이건 바쁜날이라면서(?제가 어떻게 알죠ㅠ 그런 안내 없었음.. 주말 평일 구분도 없었음) 그냥 들여보내준다고 무슨 호의 표하듯이 들여보내주더라고요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

3. 구내식당: 맛은 낫배드였는데 주문하려고 하니 닭고기랑 돼지고기 없어서 제공이 어렵다는 말 듣고 당황 ㅋㅋㅋ 이렇게 외딴 곳에 일식당, 웨스턴, 아시아음식점 이렇게 세개만 있으면서(반얀 제외) 베트남 요리 먹을 슈 있는 아시아 음식점에서 재고 관리 안된다는게 당황스러운 포인트였어요.

sample_comments.title: Far away...
sample_comments.text: 6 nights. Overall nice hotel but I didn't realize how far away it was from Danang (at least an hour by shuttle). They do accommodate for this by providing a shuttle but it doesn't run all the time and you may end up waiting for it for a while/ or if you get in late it won't get you, so we still arranged our own private transport through the hotel for about $100USD. My biggest gripe about the hotel was the fact that there is NOTHING else around and you were completely dependent on the hotel for everything. The food/ drinks prices were very high for Vietnam and was just so so, particularly the main restaurant- Rice- at the Angsana which I found to be way over priced and not very good. They do provide all day dining through room service but again pricy and not really any other options for relaxed inexpensive meal. Just FYI the ride to Hoi An is 2 hours each way and the ride to Hue is a little over an hour each way. We enjoyed our time there but there are just a few things that we would have liked to see done differently that would have made our stay better.
sample_comments.positives: Nice staff, beautiful rooms, shuttles

sample_comments.title: Good but
sample_comments.text:
Resort was the best but one step who checked in for us was very rude.
I was noticed from the hotel homepage that there are shuttle bus services to Hue and Hoi An.
However, when we checked in, the staff said us to go Hue that we should take hotel car($77) or he suggested that we could go with his friend charged $50. 
I said him there is shuttle service but he said it goes to the Hue airport not Hue city.
Next morning, I asked to tour desk about this and the staff said there is shuttle service to Hue.
Wow, this is not about money, this is about the staff attitude.
I was very disappointed but we enjoyed the resort except that.

sample_comments.title: Nice facilities but services to be improved
sample_comments.text:
The swimming pool is really nice and clean. However, I wonder if they will clean the water in the private swimming pool. The water quality just goes down after a few days...
While I stayed for 4D 3N, the TV in the living room was not functioning well. I called the staff for consecutive days, but they still didn't get what I mean until the 3rd day. My BF was very annoyed and the duty manager sent an apologize letter with a fruit platter... However, the fruit platter only came 1 hour before we checked out. If the TV was functioning well since day 1, we would not be that annoyed.

Except the TV, we were satisfied with this resort. The in-room services were very good and they delivered within 30 mins. (By the way, the restaurant called Rice Bowl is not recommended as we need to wait for over an hour after we ordered.)

Although the location of the resort is far away from the downtown, they have free shuttle bus to Hue and Hoi An. We can do some sightseeing besides enjoying the resort.

Overall, thanks for making my stay a relaxing and unforgettable one.
sample_comments.positives: Pool, View, Room Service

sample_comments.title: Very relaxing getaway with a beautiful beach
sample_comments.text: Overall we had a lovely holiday. Although the weather was a bit wet and chilly, we still found plenty to do with our three children. We loved the shared property of Banyan Tree and Angsana which gave us a lot more restaurant choice, expansive grounds to cycle around and expansive beach. Having the two properties adjacent is a huge plus. Because of our family size we loved the multi-level lofts and we never felt cramped during our 5 night stay. The service was relatively good considering language issues and the fact that the hotel only opened last spring. Restaurant service and room service quality needs to be improved. Overall, staff were very eager to please, and seemed to welcome honest feedback in order to improve service. We really enjoyed our guided bicycle tour and quad bike tour, as well as archery at the activities centre. We recommended to management that they provide more bicycles for children without training wheels. The beach also has wonderful shells!
sample_comments.positives: Beach, bicycles and activities centre/pool

- Có thể dùng bữa ở nhà hàng bên Banyan Tree, set menu cơm của nhà hàng Việt The Watercourt rất hợp khẩu vị, các bạn nhân viên của nhà hàng rất nhiệt tình

sample_comments.text:
we stayed at the 3-stories loft the first night. 3501. i felt off the stairs between roof-top and family room, and injured. the design has its own problem - sky pool that means people get wet from swimming and floors and stairs will become wet. no floor mat, no towel, no anti-slip stair surface. indeed the stairs are waxed wood so even more slippery! we changed to pool garden 3101 for the next 3 days. 

not enough glasses, cups etc in the room. no tissues or kitchen papers in the kitchen area. no ashtray even for outdoor area. hair conditioner is bad (given a resort hotel so frequent swimming). not sufficient electric socket adaptor.
sample_comments.positives: staff attention is good except at breakfast

sample_comments.title: First time getaway at Danang
sample_comments.text:
Angsana Lang Co is very far from the city centre but I supposed the location allows it to have the amenities and beautiful settings. 
The hotel is very well maintained and even the beach is kept cleaned. 
There were several hiccups and miscommunication with the reservation staff. 1. On 19 Jan, I communicated that I was expecting a parcel to be delivered to me on 21 Jan, information on my Agoda booking reference was provided. When the delivery arrived at the hotel, the hotel said they cannot find my Agoda booking reference. 2. When we shown to our room, there were birthday decorations on the bed and champagne in the room. It was meant for another person with same name but different last name. 3. We booked a private tour for 3 pax to Ba Na Hills at a quoted net price. When we checked out, the price given in the bill was different. 
Other than the several mistakes made by the reservations, we totally enjoyed our stay at the hotel.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Sharon,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your recent stay at Angsana Lăng Cô. We are delighted to know that you overall enjoyed your experience with us.

At the same time, please allow us to express our sincere apologies for the inconveniences you encountered during your stay. We deeply regret the difficulties related to the parcel delivery, the confusion with the in-room birthday arrangement, and the discrepancy in the private tour billing. These situations do not reflect the level of accuracy and attention to detail that we strive to provide, and we fully understand how such lapses may have affected your experience.

Your feedback has been carefully reviewed and shared with our reservations and front office teams, and we are taking immediate steps to strengthen our internal communication and verification processes to prevent similar occurrences in the future. We are truly grateful that you brought these matters to our attention,
sample_comments.room_type: Seaview King Grand with Balcony

sample_comments.title: Sẽ quay lại nhiều lần
sample_comments.positives:
Lần đầu đến đây 2017 vì có ấn tượng tốt nên đã quay lại cùng gia đình. 
Nhân viên nhiệt tình dễ thương, ngoại ngữ tốt, ân cần quan tâm khách.
Hồ bơi siêu đã. Phòng đẹp sạch sẽ, thiết kế tinh tế. 
Bữa sáng ổn áp, chưa có dịp thử nhà hàng khác.
Khuôn viên rộng ơi là rộng, đi dạo cùng em bé rất thích
Sẽ còn quay lại mỗi mùa hè để nghỉ ngơi cùng gia đình!
sample_comments.negatives:
Kid club đồ chơi hơi cũ, mong lần sau quay lại sẽ được chơi đồ mới hơn. 
Cũi cho bé bị mất 1 bánh xe nên hơi lắc lư. 
Parking ở ngay trước sân mà không có mái che, tấm che nên lúc check out ra giữa trưa xe nóng như nồi lẩu, để AC lúc lâu mới đỡ. 
Mình thấy nhiều review nói chỗ này xa trung tâm, hoàn toàn đồng ý nhưng nếu mục đích của bạn là nghỉ dưỡng cuối tuần thì chỗ này 100 điểm không có nhưng.

sample_comments.title: Quiet Resort for unwinding
sample_comments.text:
Room is huge and nicely kept. Private pool very enjoyable with nice sea view, perfect to cool off the heat. Very secluded location. Exceptionally helpful front desk and house-keeping staff. Water sports and pool staff also super friendly and helpful. 
 However, catering services is a bit inadequate considering guests have to rely entirely on hotel's F&B service. Very few staff to serve at pool side so you need to walk a long way to the pool side bar to order drinks or food. Only one restaurant serves all day menu and not all catering staff speaks English. Food is delicious so dining experience is still good.
Overall a very enjoyable stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Wai, 

Thank you for taking your time to share your experiences on your recent stay. We are happy to learn that you enjoyed the stay with us. Besides, your constructive feedback about the pool services and server's language ability is taken to heart and please be assured that we will focus more on staff training and will work directly with related Department Heads regarding to each of the areas in your feedback for further improvement.

We hope to welcome you back to Angsana Lang Co soon, for some more lifetime experiences!

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Junior Seaview Pool Suite Twin with Private Pool

sample_comments.negatives: Di chuyển hơi xa từ phòng đến lễ tân

sample_comments.negatives: NA

sample_comments.title: Serene ambience resort
sample_comments.text: Dear All, good Wednesday, we enjoyed the resort environment and best cleanliness bed room assigned at 3 floor building with balcony mountain view. The resort is far away from bustling and hustling city who want a quiet holdays. The big lagoon pool sizable was amazing, however, the hot sun was too shining for stopping swimmers. The resort is big enough that there have free bikes cycling around this resort. The breakfast buffet spread is up to 5 stars standard at nice restaurant. The gym equipment is up to date, however, the gym size and sauna size is small. Moreover, dissppointed that there is no hair dryer etcs inside changing room. The staffs are well trained and nice chat to us. The good resort provide free shuttle car to and fro airport which save us transportation fare. Overall, we highly recommended you and family to visit this resort.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ang,

Thank you for staying with us at Angsana Lăng Cô and for posting your kind feedback here. We are delighted to learn that you enjoyed your stay and take well note on the lack of hair dryer in the changing room for further improvement.

We hope to welcome you back soon for more lifetime memories.

Wish you all the best from our beautiful Lăng Cô bay area!

Glen Cook,
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Cảnh quan, dịch vụ, đồ ăn đều đẹp.

sample_comments.title: Good place for holiday but the service should be improve
sample_comments.text:
We came to the hotel at 3:15 PM after I completed the booking at 1 PM on the same day but the room still not ready to check-in. We waited for almost 45 mins to finish the check-in process (quite tired because we have a long transit from DN to Hue and of course we want to take some rest as soon as possible). Another thing that makes us very disappointed about the level of your property, looks like we got lied because we expect our room is garden view but receptionist brings us to a room with ocean view, although it's a higher type of room but we want to know that why you guys changed my property without asking or explanation.
But after all, the room and view quite nice, and it's a plus
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Kim,

Thank you for choosing to stay at Angsana Langco and sparing your valuable time to share your experience with us.
We much appreciate your feedback and we regret to learn that our service did not meet your expectation. Regarding your concern about the check-in process, the booking had been made just 2 hours in advance so that your room category was still being under preparation by your arrival time. We did understand your feeling and tried to present our nice gesture with a special offer of ocean view room type for you. We have taken note your comments to your profile for delivering better arrival experience next time. 
Thank you once more for sharing us your point of views. We look forward to seeing you again in the future and get a chance to recover your impression!

Wishing you all the best form Langco, Vietnam!

Kind regards,
Figen Bulut
Hotel Manager

And there are no any restaurants near by therefore you have only one choice to use the restaurants inside , but they are so rip off. I came by one time and no more .
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kelly,

Thank you for your assessment of Angsana Lăng Cô following your stay with us last month.
We believe that you had a long-distance traveling but it's worth & left you unforgettable memories.
Actually, our location - after all is one of the main reasons why so many of guests return to us time and again to escape from the rush of the city and relax in the purity of our natural and peaceful environment. Besides, we are operating with the price which is in line with other resorts of comparative caliber. We carry similar costs and we deliver comparable quality.
Thank you again for your comments here and it is our hope to be able to welcome you back for future stays as well.

With kind regards,
Figen Bulut 
Hotel Manager

sample_comments.title: Great place to just relax
sample_comments.text: As a place to just relax, Angsana Long Co gets top marks. The beach is one of the best I have been on. The location is such that anywhere you may want to go is a couple of hours away so that pretty much force you to stay at the hotel and take the pressure off. Staff was great. The fact that the property is new and as yet 'undiscovered' coupled along with the lack of visitors from mainland China put occupancy rates at below 20%. While this allowed for a great staff to guest ratio some restaurants were closed which limits dining options. Definetly a place I would go back to for another 3-4 days holiday.

sample_comments.negatives: Isolated. Pool closed at 6,30 pm. Two hours to hoi an. One and a half hours to hue. No villages around. No shops. No cultural experience. Had to catch a taxi to nearest village. 20 km away. No entertainment. No music.

sample_comments.title: Sensational
sample_comments.text: We had a great stay here. Mainly there to play golf and the course is fantastic. Food: small servings and expensive. Rooms are large, tidy and awesome with the pool in the premier rooms. Very relaxing part of the work, quiet mid week but busy on the weekends. Overall had a great time and will be back for sure.
sample_comments.positives: Rooms / Beach / Pool

sample_comments.title: Management should have acted professionally & advised guests months in advance of the Indian Wedding
sample_comments.positives: Location is amazing. Staff are superb.
sample_comments.negatives:
We booked & paid for this short break in May for what we considered to be a very peaceful/tranquil location around 1 hours drive north of Da Nang. It was meant to be 4 wonderful days of R & R at the end of an exhausting 3 week tour of Vietnam. One week before we were due to arrive the Management informed us by message that our stay would co-inside with a large Indian Wedding (450 people) & that there might be some disruption!

There were a number of incidents over the period we were there, here's a few examples:

I ask them to confirm which Restaurants would be closed & was informed only Moomba would be closed on the Friday evening. We tried to have lunch in the Market Place restaurant Thursday lunchtime & were told it was closed for the Indian Wedding. We booked dinner that evening at The Water Court & when we arrived it was closed for the Wedding & we were taken to the Azure Restaurant & were told me could select from the Water Court's menu & it would be brought to us from that restaurant. Felt we were being treated like 2nd class citizens!!

Overnight Thursday staff were constructing a very large stage on the beach fairly close to where we were staying. At around 06:00 Friday morning the Wedding planners decided to sound check the sound systems which must have woken everyone up. No consideration was given to us or any other couples or families who weren't associated with the wedding.

I spoke with a number of other guests not associated with the Wedding & just about everyone was totally fed-up with it. The staff were very apologetic but responsibility rests with the Management, they should have informed all guests not associated with the Wedding months in advance & offered alternative accommodation or a full re-fund. It's totally pointless informing us 1 week beforehand.

sample_comments.title: Great Customer Service
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in the Angsana with our two boys ages 3 years and 5 years. We were there during a typhoon and a very bad rain storm. However, the hotel did a very good job with the given situation. 
The breakfast is excellent (Marketplace) - loads of selection for the buffet. The Rice Bowl restaurant has great atmosphere, and very good food. We were a bit disappointed with the Moomba restaurant (lunch). The food was ok, but nothing special. The selection is limited. Moomba could be improved with some more salads, better Vietnamese food options (espcially the southern style "fresh" foods) and improved cocktails (hotel wide). The cocktail list is good - but for the most part were disappointing. The balance of flavours is not quite right... 
The restaurant hours could be improved. For a large hotel, there should always be a restaurant open or somewhere to get food other than room service (limited menu). With young children being able to access food/snacks any time is important. 
 I did one spa treatment, which was very good. The therapist was excellent and asked several times if her pressure was ok. In addition, the receptionist reconfirmed my booking and asked a few questions to determine that the massage I had booked matched what I actually wanted. 
I would not recommend the loft rooms for young families. The pool is not safe. It is inifinity style and there are gaps on the sides (at least in the room we saw). We stayed in a ground floor room, which was great. Our room had no view really (5119), but was protected well from the typhoon:) 
We would definately go back to Angsana Lang Co again and hope for good weather!
sample_comments.positives: Great kids club. big, comfortable rooms and relaxing location

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: Location is in middle of no where

sample_comments.title: Nearly perfect

sample_comments.title: Terrible expeience with weather no indoor activitivies

sample_comments.negatives: The weather was terrible, with four constant days of rain. We did not enjoy the outdoor activities, pools, or beach. And there was a lack of indoor facilities and activities for families and children during the rain. It was an expensive resort with poor indoor activities for poor weather. This was a stressful and poor experience for a time after waiting ten years to visit and at a considerable expense to our budget. I was very disappointed and stressed throughout my whole time at the resort; it was not worth the enormous, expensive costs we paid for the top-rated resort.

The drivers were v friendly and worked hard to bring us to our destinations despite the rainy weather and road conditions. Overall,it lives up to the standard.

the hotel is impressive and staff when they are available are friendly and helpful. i feel there is a need to have more staff at the reception. 
the hotel towels that was in our room were stained with blood! also, when we checked in, one of the blinds were not working and maintenance had to spend 30 minutes trying to fix this. these issues should be avoided in the future.

sample_comments.positives: Good breakfast, the room and resort's facilities - all are value for money. Great family retreat for the weekends.
sample_comments.negatives: The fact that majority at Angsana Lang Co are coming from and to Da Nang, when we request for drop off at Hue city, they messed up our requesr and sent us to Da Nang instead, totally not cool. The staffs did not do a good job in taking correct notes.

sample_comments.title: A resort of two halves.
sample_comments.positives: The pool area is first class, 400m of meandering pools and waterways set in stunning grounds. Fabulous staff who were welcoming, friendly and willing to please. Fabulous breakfast, with great variety.
sample_comments.negatives: Our room was beyond tired and not really fit to be rented out. The private pool was dirty, as was the deck and with furniture, lights and tiles broken. The staff couldn't have tried harder but the issue was the tired infrastructure. Hopefully they are rectifying as we can't be the only ones to have complained.

sample_comments.title: review Angsana hotel
sample_comments.text: Very well organized. Staff is kind
sample_comments.positives: very kind, clean, buggy and boat transportation

sample_comments.title: Good but overpriced.
sample_comments.positives: The pool was really big and nice to swim in. Also, the full bar was really cool. There's also very nice long beach very clean. It was nice that the hotel offered some activity like a pool, ping-pong and table tennis. Good service and really friendly staff!
sample_comments.negatives: The hotel has 5 stars but according to us this is more like a low 4 star hotel due to its outdated facilities. Also, the prices for food and beverages were really expensice, even more than in other actual 5 star resort that we have been in Vietnam.

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel
sample_comments.text: Overall it was a very nice experience. We stayed at 1-bedroom suite which the room is very spacious for two people, and there is a private pool and sun deck outside the room. The private pool is larger than I expected (it's around 7m long and depth is 1.3m). Hotel location is very remote and nothing nearby. Transfer between hotel and airport needs about 1hr 15mins. However, hotel provides free shuttle to airport, Hoi An and Hue, but not to the city center. Taxi from hotel to Da Nang city center takes about 1hr 15mins and the cost is USD80 for round trip, which is a bit expensive. In general, staff are nice and helpful.
sample_comments.positives: Spacious room with a decent private pool; value for money; nice long beach

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: The facilities were fantastic, private rooftop pool was great. Pools and the beach were top notch.
sample_comments.negatives: The location was too isolating, expensive to get cars/taxis to local towns. Restaurants were expensive based on what you pay at other locations in Vietnam.

sample_comments.title: Very pleasent, attentive staff, great surroundings
sample_comments.text: Excellent, in particular we really appreciate the staff at Water Court restaurant who took the initiative to look after us. One particular staff member that we would like to acknowledge is "Xuan". She made our dinning expereience very enjoyable.
sample_comments.positives: Brand new, beautiful landscape, good facility except dinning was limited. Great beach, very helpful staff.

sample_comments.title: A relaxing break, but not as luxurious as billed.
sample_comments.positives: Great pool area; always possible to find shade and sun beds. Apartment was a good size. Most staff were friendly and helpful. Breakfast was the best we experienced in Vietnam. We had a good meal in the Japanese restaurant.
sample_comments.negatives: Being a captive audience, with no choice but to pay HUGELY inflated prices for somewhat inconsistent food and service which was not often any better than we received elsewhere in Vietnam (for much less). Some aspects of the apartment could have done with a little maintenance and/or deep cleaning. (The rug in the lounge area, for example, was filthy.)

sample_comments.title: exellent stay
sample_comments.positives: loft. pool, beach

sample_comments.title: Fantastic rooms and pool, go to the Banyan Tree restaurants and don't use their Taxis.
sample_comments.positives: Good resort hotel with fantastic rooms and sea views. The pool sprawls around the grounds, great fun although mostly shallow. There's even a swim up bar. It was pretty quiet during our stay, it's a big hotel and it seems like there are a few new resorts in this area. Breakfast was ok for Vegans, although not up to European standards. You can book meals at the Banyan Tree hotel next door, which are much nicer (and more expensive, but only a bit) than Angsana's. We had an outstanding meal at Saffron. It's expensive for Vietnam but this would be a steal back in London for the quality of food and the service. They even take you there and drop you back in a golf buggy.
sample_comments.negatives:
2 of the 3 hotel restaurants are actually one kitchen with 2 floors. You can even order from either menu. The food is good but the service was extremely slow. The place was dead quiet when we arrived but as soon as it filled up (but nowhere near capacity) the staff clearly couldn't cope. We had to ask a couple of times to check on our food after waiting for over 40 mins, and then had to get up to find a waiter to get the bill. Given the price and the fact that this is a 5 star hotel, it was pretty unacceptable and we weren't the only ones frustrated that night. Go early or go to one of the Banyan Tree restaurants.

We booked a Taxi through the hotel to take us to Hue city and then on to Hue airport. Firstly he made a pretty inappropriate comment about my partner and asked how old she was. On leaving for the airport he drove in the opposite direction out of the city. We realised this and had to ask him to turn around. He then put his satnav on and tried to take even more wrong turns, again taking us away from the airport. At this point we had to shout at him to take us to the airport or stop and let us out. This was a really scary moment given the comment he had made about my partner earlier. He eventually drove us to the airport but drove pretty dangerously, and had very little change when we arrived and paid up. This is not the kind of experience we would expect when booking a Taxi through any decent hotel, never mind a 5 star resort. You should book your own transfers to and from the resort if you can.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Food is good but ridiculous expensive
sample_comments.response:
Dear Le,

Thank you for your feedback. Whilst we are glad you enjoyed the food, we are sorry to hear that our pricing did not meet your expectations. Although we strive to offer high-quality ingredients and a memorable dining experience, we also understand that reasonable pricing is important factor to our guests. Your input is truly appreciated, and we will take it into consideration as we continue to improve.

sample_comments.text:
Overall the hotel is okay, territory is large, food on breakfast and in restaurant is tasty, spa is pleasant, room service is good and tasty. We leaved in two floors appartments with pool on the roof and it was not so good, especially the roof with pool, rust and dust everywhere, pool was not so clean, also everyday cleaning was not so good especially windows and glass surfaces. In rooms there was bad smell and the pillows began smell awful as well. Also when we turned on the conditioner for a long time on the lowest temperature it began smell so bad like mould was inside. Also I was very confused when in restaurant was no free water, I think that in five stars hotels it's expectable. We tried desserts in cafe and some of them were not so fresh. 
I knew that it's far away from the city and just want to say that it's really far away, about one and a half hour by car. Just keep in mind.

sample_comments.title: Decent stay at Angsana Lang Co
sample_comments.text: The stay at Angsana Lang co was okay. We were there for 6 nights and one thing to know is that this property is located in the interiors of Lang Co and there is nothing else close-by. Grab is not available as it's too far though cabs are available for rentals through the hotel (of course, with a premium compared to what a Grab would cost). There are no other food options close-by so you would need to eat at the restaurant/in-room dining. Having stayed at multiple 5-star properties, we felt property is nice but is average for the price charged per night (it's good but lacks some character). Also, the lack of other options to dine, close-by, was something we missed (probably should have researched this earlier). Also the front-desk & guest services staff does struggle a bit to communicate in English - we do understand that it isn't their first language but we even struggled with getting them to understand basic things like salt & pepper - you would expect at least basic English in a star resort that is catering mainly to tourists. All in all it was a decent stay at the property.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Varun,

Thank you for letting us know your experience and taking the time to comment on your observations in such a detailed and constructive manner. We are extremely regret to learn that our hotel did not meet your expectation and lost the chance to gain your impression.

We will surely need to improve the language skills of the team members and do appreciate your comments on various issues on services and facilities. Please rest assured the Resort Management treat your feedback with utmost importance and seriousness to ensure we learn from our mistake and continuously maintain service standards.

Once again, we are thankful that you brought these concerns to our attention and do hope to have an opportunity to welcome you back again, for some more lifetime experiences.

Best regards, 

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Reasonably cheap pool villa
sample_comments.text:
We rent a 2 bedroom sky pool villa for 2 night. 

Pros: nice and helpful staff. Free shuttle to/from the airport every 1-2 hours. located by the beach. Lots of free activities including kayaking, SUP, snookers, boat trip to banyan tree resort.... swimming pool with lots of sun bed. Free iced tea and fruit were offered by the staff. 

Cons: cleaners were still in the house while we were brought up to the villa. Fishy smell in the fridge,sink and kitchen area. Lots of dead insects in the pool after the first night. 

Overall the stay worths the money, but if you are looking at 5 stay luxury stay, probably go somewhere else.

sample_comments.title: Know what you're getting into
sample_comments.positives: We stayed for 3 nights which was great. We knew it was isolated and so were prepared for that.
sample_comments.negatives: Having to pay for everything. Complimentary non motorised water sports, push bikes and even golf buggies would make a big difference given the remote location. Improved consistency of staff would be good. Some are very attentive while it's really difficult to get the attention of orhers!

sample_comments.title: Best destination for serenity!
sample_comments.text:
Location: the resort is located far away from the airport (complimentary airport/city shuttle available), but a good place for serenity. 

Service & Communication: their services are great & staff are willing to help; however, some communication issue occurred where some reception staff had hard time understanding English.

Building: the resort sits in extraordinary surroundings --- beautiful beach and mountains; one thing to add is that the exterior building seems to need a repainting to satisfy the title of 5-star hotel.

Responsibility: the swiftness of responsibility is really lacking: I had to send the exact same email three times & a phone call to hear from them. 

Capacity & Assessibility: when different types of rooms are booked, be aware of walking distance --- as the different type of room is located in different side of building.

Complimentary Activities & Services: the resort provides a wide selection of activities & a birthday cake!

sample_comments.negatives: I found the coffee to be a bit of a disappointment after enjoying wonderful coffee in the hotel in Saigon. The putting of service on every bar and restaurant bill was a bit strange, I am used to being given the option to pay service if I choose to, not being expected to pay service. Some of the hotel was a bit tired and in need of maintenance.

sample_comments.text:
Although the resort is a bit far from Da Nang Airport, it suits us perfectly because Angsana is secluded and away from tourist sites. 
We went in Oct 2017 and the staff said it was low season for them, so there weren't many guests in the resort.
The resort was very clean and all the staff was nice. Binh from the restaurant Rice Bowl was super friendly and the dishes he recommended exceeded our expectations. 
There are many activities to do at Angsana and even though we didn't go out at all during our stay, we had a great time.

sample_comments.positives:
Beautiful resort with friendly staff. We stayed in a courtyard 2 bedroom apartment which had a great sized pool for a family of four. The main pool had lots of space to enjoy a longer swim. Swim up bar had nice cocktails at happy hour. 

The hotel was very busy over the weekend but restaurant bookings were easy to make by What's app. Fabulous buffet breakfast and though busy it was always well stocked with a foods from a variety of countries. 

Great to have table tennis, beach volleyball net, table football and pool table also available.

sample_comments.positives:
Beautiful gardens and excellent pool. Lovely beach.
Clean large comfortable room with great view. Kids loved the included inflatable slide. And the pool toys (additional cost) 
Good happy hour from 3pm at pool bar.
amazing delicious champagne breakfast buffet with so much choice.
